title: BHN PostgreSQL Stats
description: LA PG workload telemetry — activity, top queries, table sizes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT measured_at AS time, numbackends FROM pg_activity_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) ORDER BY 1
SELECT measured_at AS time, (blks_hit::float / NULLIF(blks_hit + blks_read, 0)) * 100 AS hit_pct FROM pg_activity_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) ORDER BY 1

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(measured_at) AS m FROM pg_query_stats) SELECT q.role_name, q.calls, q.total_exec_ms, q.mean_exec_ms, q.rows_returned, LEFT(q.query_text, 100) AS query_excerpt FROM pg_query_stats q, latest WHERE q.measured_at = latest.m ORDER BY q.total_exec_ms DESC LIMIT 25

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(measured_at) AS m FROM pg_table_stats) SELECT t.schema_name, t.table_name, t.n_live_tup, t.n_dead_tup, t.total_bytes, t.last_autovacuum FROM pg_table_stats t, latest WHERE t.measured_at = latest.m ORDER BY t.total_bytes DESC LIMIT 25
